blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter — now PSG and Real Madrid must hold their nerve
Glimt's 2-1 win in Milan last night was the shock of the Champions League season. Tonight the pressure shifts — PSG hold a 3-2 lead over Monaco, Real Madrid nurse a narrow edge against Benfica.
⚽ 18:45 — Atalanta vs Dortmund — Germans lead 2-0 on aggregate, progression expected
